name: AVPU Scale
description: Rapid 4-level consciousness assessment. Faster than GCS for initial triage.
instructions: Assess the highest level of response the patient demonstrates.

scoring.label: Alert
scoring.description: Patient is awake, aware, and responding normally

scoring.label: Voice
scoring.description: Patient responds only to verbal stimulation

scoring.label: Pain
scoring.description: Patient responds only to painful stimuli (sternal rub, nail bed pressure)

scoring.label: Unresponsive
scoring.description: No response to any stimuli -- immediate airway intervention required

interpretation.triage: Critical -- airway at risk, GCS typically <= 8
